summary: Completed Lens Contract compliance testing for HOW lens responses. 22/22 backend tests passed. Key finding: GET /api/how/priorities returns confidence_label:'unknown' instead of proper labels - minor issue requiring fix.

minor.issue: confidence_label is always 'unknown' instead of proper labels (strong/moderate/low)
minor.root_cause: HOWLens.priority_item() looks for economic_impact.confidence but priorities don't have this field set. Should fetch related state to get confidence.
minor.workaround: Use GET /api/system/value-summary instead which correctly fetches state confidence

action_items: FIX: Update GET /api/how/priorities endpoint in server.py to fetch state confidence and pass to HOWLens
Alternative: Update first-five-minutes endpoint to store confidence in economic_impact when creating priorities
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/how/priorities does not fetch state confidence - results in 'unknown' confidence_label
The value-summary endpoint correctly fetches state to get confidence - this pattern should be copied to how/priorities

success_rate.frontend: Not tested - backend only testing requested

seed_data_creation: Tests use POST /api/system/demo/first-five-minutes endpoint which creates demo data with states, priorities, and verified outcomes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lens Contract compliance tests created in /app/backend/tests/test_lens_contract_compliance.py. All 22 tests pass. The main fix needed is for GET /api/how/priorities to fetch state confidence (currently returns 'unknown'). All other endpoints (value-summary, first-five-minutes) correctly return confidence_label strings.

verified_compliant: GET /api/system/value-summary - top_actions has confidence_label, severity_band, no raw scores
GET /api/system/value-summary - verified_outcomes has confidence_label, no forbidden fields
POST /api/system/demo/first-five-minutes - priority_actions has confidence_label and band
GET /api/how/priorities - does not expose baseline_value or score_components
needs_fix: GET /api/how/priorities - confidence_label is 'unknown' instead of correct labels

confidence_label_mapping.unknown: confidence not available (current bug in how/priorities)
